title: 65 Pieces Animal Figures Toy Set - Plastic Educational Jungle Animal Toys for Boys Girls Kids Toddlers Farm Small Animals. Includes 44 Mini Animal Figures,16 Fences, 4 Grass and 1 Trees
features: VALUABLE PACK - Pack of 65 plastic animal set, including 44pcs no repeated animals, 16 fences, 4 grass and 1 tree. Figures measure about 2.2 inch
SAFE PLAY - Animals are made of high quality plastic that is 100% safe. Conforms to US Toy Safety Standards. Safety always comes first

LEARNING TOYS - Animal figures include rabbit, chicken, horse, cow, cheetah, elephant, gazelle, giraffe, gnu, gorilla, hippo, lion, rhinoceros, tiger and zebra etc. Great leaning Toy to tell the realistic animals, bring hours of imaginative play and early vocabulary development

ENCYCLOPEDIA - Perfect novelty gift for kids, toddler, boy and girl! Prefect decorations for birthday party, jungle animal party and cupcakes! Animal figures are fun for any bag or prize for a school or church carnival
REALISTIC LOOKING: It comes in realistic looking, bright colors, children can learn with fun and identify them easily, they can create their various insects works with those fake animals.
description: Product Description We l come to the animal paradise at GuassLee. If you are looking for something to fascinate your kids for a while, animal figures will keep your child hooked. Realistically detailed animal figurines inspire imaginative play and curiosity as learning toy, and makes the perfect novelty gift for kids ages 3 and up! Animal toys can also be used as a party favor, party giveaway, birthday gift, sensory water bin or even as a teacher's visual aid. Animal Figure Type GuassLee animal figures include rabbit, chicken, horse, cow, cheetah, elephant, gazelle, giraffe, gnu, gorilla, hippo, lion, rhinoceros, tiger and zebra etc. Great leaning Toy to tell the realistic animals, bring hours of imaginative play and early vocabulary development. Kid-Friendly All of our toys at GuassLee are specially crafted with child safety in mind, first and foremost. Toys are constructed with 100% non-toxic materials. Rest easy knowing GuassLee toys are always tons of fun and 100% child-friendly. Lifetime Learners GuassLee believes all children grow up to be lifetime learners, and that the learning process is especially critical in their crucial early years. Some of our toys facilitate development of fine motor skills, cognitive learning, and problem-solving. With each new toy we create, we open new avenues to challenge and educate children in fun, engaging, and family-friendly ways!
